name: Generic Garage Door 433MHz
description: Common rolling-code garage door opener signal captured at 433.92 MHz. Works with many generic single-channel remotes.

name: Car Key Fob 315MHz
description: Generic North American car key fob signal at 315 MHz. Recorded from a common aftermarket remote.

name: Apartment Intercom Bell
description: Door bell trigger for a common apartment intercom panel. Press-to-open signal recorded at the entry unit.

name: Acurite Weather Station 433MHz
description: Temperature and humidity broadcast from an Acurite 609TXC outdoor weather sensor. Transmits every 16 seconds.

name: Custom ISM Band Beacon
description: Custom raw beacon signal captured on the European ISM band at 868 MHz. Purpose unknown — shared for analysis.
